calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Petitioner: Shanhong Wan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Fang Wan, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: James Fang Wan.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Reset To Jun-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Shanhong Wan was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Fang Wan, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Publication in file.

Petitioner did not have a valid Proof of Service re: notification of minor's father of the proposed name change of minor. Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a minor is continued to June 17, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Department. 218.
Petitioner shall submit a proof of service fre: notice to the Minor's father of the new hearing date, or an Order dispensing with notice. No further publication required.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
